name: system-design-doc
description: Create standardized system design documents — supports Reverse Engineering from codebase, Import from implementation plan, Interactive Brainstorming with Mermaid diagrams, Architecture patterns (Microservices, Event-driven, Clean Architecture, DDD)

commands.name: system-design-doc
commands.description: Create a standardized system design document. Supports Reverse Engineering from codebase with Mermaid diagrams

commands.name: create-design-doc
commands.description: Create a new system design document from requirements

commands.name: reverse-engineer
commands.description: Create a system design document from an existing codebase (Reverse Engineering)

commands.name: create-diagram
commands.description: Create a specific diagram type (ER, Flow, DFD, Sequence, Sitemap, State, Class)

commands.name: edit-section
commands.description: Edit a specific section of the system design document

commands.name: validate-design-doc
commands.description: Validate completeness and consistency of the system design document

commands.name: import-plan
commands.description: Import an implementation plan or free-form design doc into a standardized system design document

commands.name: brainstorm-design
commands.description: Interactive brainstorming and Q&A session for system design

commands.name: sync-with-mockups
commands.description: Synchronize data between design_doc_list.json and mockup_list.json

commands.name: sync-with-features
commands.description: Synchronize data between design_doc_list.json and feature_list.json

commands.name: validate-integration
commands.description: Validate cross-references across system-design-doc, ui-mockup, and long-running plugins
